# personal-site

> Open-source personal website and blog template optimized for LLMs and search engines (Generative Engine Optimization, GEO). Server-rendered FastAPI, JSON-LD entity graph, Notion CMS, deploys to Railway.

personal-site helps founders, executives, and developers build a personal website that AI assistants such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude can read, understand, and cite. It ships server-side rendering, a JSON-LD Person/WebSite/Article entity graph, an explicit AI-crawler allowlist in robots.txt, a dynamic sitemap, llms.txt, and an RSS feed by default. Rebrand the whole site by editing one file.

## Docs
- [README](https://github.com/levinishnikov/personal-site/blob/main/README.md): full setup, configuration, and deploy guide
- [Live demo](https://llmceo.com): a production site built with this template

## What it solves
- Getting a personal site indexed and cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google, Bing, and Yandex
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and LLM SEO for personal brands and developer portfolios
- Machine-readable content: JSON-LD structured data, robots.txt, llms.txt, sitemap, RSS

## Stack
- FastAPI, Python, server-side rendering
- PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy
- Notion as a CMS
- Railway deployment
